title: monochoria hastata var. elata
intro: Monochoria hastata var. elata, also known as Elata Water Wisteria or Water Spangle, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Haloragaceae. It is native to Australia, Asia, and the Pacific Islands, and is characterized by its distinctive white flowers and long stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, with potential health benefits including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Monochoria hastata var. elata can be used as a decoction or infusion, often combined with other herbs, to create teas, tonics, and poultices for medicinal purposes.
